title: Totem of Undying Eren
description: Unleash your determination with Eren Yeager as your Totem of Undying!
body:
![Totem preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e6e33db90adca0a71d46a44827018a61bc6b98a.png)

## 🟢 Eren Totem – Attack on Titan

Unleash your determination with **Eren Yeager** as your **Totem of Undying**!
This pixel-art totem embodies Eren’s unstoppable spirit and fight for freedom.

### Currently Available:

- **Eren** [Click Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-eren-attack-on-titan)
- **Mikasa** [Click Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-mikasa-attack-on-titan)
- **Armin** [Click Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-armin-attack-on-titan)

### ✨ Features:

- Retro pixel-art Eren Totem.
- Distinct AoT-inspired design.
- Easy to install and use.

### 📥 Installation:

1. Download the .zip.
2. Place it inside .minecraft/resourcepacks.
3. Activate it in Resource Pack settings.

### 🔗 Stay connected:
